title: tulisma verticillata
intro: Tulisma verticillata, also known as the Whorled Earthball, is a type of fungus that belongs to the family Pyronemataceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Whorled Earthball is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Tulisma verticillata can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
